headline: Robinhood, AI Plays Lead Five Stocks Near Buy Points
summary: Robinhood Markets and a pair of resurgent AI infrastructure plays, Dell Technologies and Cisco Systems, lead this weekend's watchlist of five stocks near buy points.  Joining HOOD and AI stocks DELL and CSCO are two IRL (in real life) stocks.  Outfront Media, a real estate investment trust, focuses on billboard and transit advertising, while Match Group operates Tinder and other dating sites.

headline: Pushing the Edge: Super Micro Computer Reboots the AI Landscape
summary: Super Micro Computer launched a Kubernetes edge AI appliance with Red Hat and Portworx targeting sovereign AI demand, even as shares fell 30% and short interest rose to about 19% of its float.

raw.headline: Pushing the Edge: Super Micro Computer Reboots the AI Landscape

headline: Trump Accounts May Boost Kids' Savings— but Experts Say it Could Cost Families Thousands in College Aid
summary: President Donald Trump’s newly launched Trump Accounts could affect a student’s eligibility for need-based college financial aid, although the U.S. Department of Education has not yet issued official guidance on how the accounts should be reported on the Free Application...

headline: Dell (DELL) Says XPS Eyesafe Study Improved Sleep Eye Comfort And Productivity
summary: Dell Technologies' XPS laptops with Eyesafe IQ and Eyesafe Display features were evaluated in a 9 week independent in home study. The research, presented at a major scientific conference and published in a peer reviewed journal, reported improvements in user sleep quality, eye comfort, and productivity. The findings give Dell a new, research based wellness angle for its premium PC offerings, beyond traditional hardware metrics. Dell Technologies, NYSE:DELL, is drawing fresh attention to its...
